scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "MySQL,Backend,Frontend" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,magenta" "npm run mysql" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm start --prefix frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently --names "MySQL,Backend,Frontend" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,magenta" "npm run mysql" "npm start --prefix backend" "npm start --prefix frontend"
